overview: Mj Player Pro is a premium local media player that runs entirely in your browser. Load video and audio files locally — nothing is ever uploaded. Features 200% audio boost, a beautiful dark glassmorphism UI, playback controls, library folder scanning, and PWA install support.
features: Premium dark glassmorphism UI with blue accents
200% audio boost via Web Audio API
Full playback controls: play/pause, seek, volume, speed
100% local — files never leave the browser
